name: REGO PAYMENT ARCHITECTURES, INC.
summary: Rego Payment Architectures, Inc. (RPMT) is a company focused on payment architecture services and licensing. The company has generated limited revenues to date and is developing services for introduction to market. It operates in a relatively new industry involving payment technologies, seeking to develop licensing programs and generate business through its intellectual property rights.
